subject: Physics

The value of $$x$$ is ___________ (use $$h=4.14 \times 10^{-15} ~\mathrm{eVs}, c=3 \times 10^{8} \mathrm{~ms}^{-1}$$ ).

The capacitance of the capacitor needed to maximize the average rate at which energy is supplied will be _________ $$\mu \mathrm{F}$$.

Water gets compressed to $$0.01 \%$$ whereas the liquid gets compressed to $$0.03 \%$$. The ratio of Bulk modulus of water to that of the liquid is $$\frac{3}{x}$$. The value of $$x$$ is ____________.
